# @fluenti/cli

> CLI tool for Fluenti — message extraction, catalog compilation, translation stats, and AI-powered translation.

## Overview

@fluenti/cli provides the command-line workflow for Fluenti projects: extract translatable messages from source code, compile catalogs to optimized JS modules, view translation progress, and translate using AI.

- Package: @fluenti/cli
- Binary: `fluenti`
- Docs: https://fluenti.dev
- Repository: https://github.com/usefluenti/fluenti/tree/main/packages/cli
- License: MIT

## Install

```bash
pnpm add -D @fluenti/cli
```

## Configuration

Create `fluenti.config.ts` in your project root:

```ts
export default {
  sourceLocale: 'en',
  locales: ['en', 'ja', 'zh-CN'],
  catalogDir: './locales',
  format: 'po',                          // 'po' or 'json'
  include: ['./src/**/*.{vue,tsx,jsx,ts,js}'],
  compileOutDir: './locales/compiled',
}
```

## Commands

### `fluenti extract`
Scan source files for translatable messages and update catalog files.

```bash
fluenti extract [--config path]
```

Extracts from: Vue SFC (`v-t`, `<Trans>`, `<Plural>`, `t()`), TSX/JSX (`t```, `t()`, `<Trans>`, `<Plural>`).

### `fluenti compile`
Compile PO/JSON catalogs to optimized ES modules.

```bash
fluenti compile [--config path] [--split]
```

- Default mode: generates `.ts` files with `export default { ... }`
- Split mode (`--split`): named exports with `@__PURE__` annotations for tree-shaking

### `fluenti stats`
Show translation progress for all locales.

```bash
fluenti stats [--config path]
```

### `fluenti translate`
AI-powered translation using local CLI tools.

```bash
fluenti translate [--provider claude|codex] [--locale ja] [--batch-size 50] [--config path]
```

- `--provider`: `claude` (Claude Code CLI) or `codex` (OpenAI Codex CLI). Default: `claude`
- `--locale`: translate specific locale only; omit for all non-source locales
- `--batch-size`: messages per AI call. Default: `50`

## Typical Workflow

```bash
fluenti extract          # Extract messages from source
fluenti translate        # AI-translate untranslated messages
fluenti compile --split  # Compile to tree-shakeable JS
fluenti stats            # Check translation progress
```
